title: The Smithsons - (KCE) - SA
notes:
Closed Systems Remedial Dosing via fitted dosing pots

To dose the LTHW, CHW and Condense systems with corrosion inhibitor and mono-ethylene glycol

3 x M27

12 x WTP MEG 


VISIT 1-Dosing
- LTHW - 10 litres WTP M27
- CHW - 20 litres WTP M27
- Condense - 300 litres WTP MEG 



VISIT 2- post dose sampling
- LTHW - 1 x CHEM POST DOSE
- CHW - 1 x CHEM POST DOSE
- Condense 1 x CHEM POST DOSE + GLYCOL
(Suite = CHEM BASIC+GLYCOL, 1L Sample required)
(Suite=CHEM POST DOSE, 1L Sample required)
